taskName: Requirement change alignment - remove remote admin page from FileEasy v1
goal: Update FileEasy v1 source-of-truth documents so the remote /admin management page and remote file-management capabilities are removed from v1 scope.
nonGoals: Do not change application code in this task.
Do not add replacement remote management features.
Do not re-expand v1 with preview, rename, delete, batch delete, or remote download.
Do not change the upload-only core requirements except where they referenced remote admin.
deliverables: updated integration checklist and next-phase plan

acceptanceChecks.text: PRD and design documents no longer require remote /admin, remote preview, remote rename, remote delete, batch delete, or remote file download for FileEasy v1.
The documents clearly state that / is the only remote user-facing page in v1 and that APK-local controls handle service status, upload QR/address, and password change.

Acceptance checklist and next-phase plan are updated so future validation focuses on upload page, password/login, chunk/resume, foreground service stability, same-WiFi, hotspot, network switching, interrupted upload, and reboot recovery.

verificationCommands: rg -n "/admin|管理页|管理后台|预览|重命名|批量删除|下载" docs/FileEasy-PRD-v1.0.md docs/FileEasy-Design-v1.0.md docs/FileEasy-AI-Workflow-v1.0.md docs/FileEasy-Visual-Interaction-Spec-v1.0.md docs/FileEasy-Wireframe-Spec-v1.0.md docs/ai-execution-framework/projects/fileeasy/reports/FileEasy-v1-Integration-Checklist.md docs/ai-execution-framework/projects/fileeasy/reports/FileEasy-v1-Next-Phase-Plan.md docs/ai-execution-framework/projects/fileeasy/reports/FileEasy-v1-Overall-Acceptance-Report.md
handoffQuestions: List every remaining document mention of remote admin or remote management and explain whether it is historical, removed-scope, or still actionable.
Confirm whether the implementation task FE-V105 can proceed without ambiguity.
